## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Translation / copy

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] User-facing strings are in `src/lib/i18n/messages.ts` for **both** `id` and `en`
- [ ] Wording follows the [domain & wording rules](../CONTRIBUTING.md#domain--wording-rules) (non-fatwa, plain, honestly labelled)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for any fiqh-engine or scheduler change
- [ ] Added a line under `## [Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md` (for user-facing changes)

## Screenshots

<!-- For UI changes, add before/after. If you changed copy, show both languages (id + en). -->

<!-- Anything tricky, especially if the change touches prayer logic or fiqh wording. -->
